accommodate: The hotel can accommodate all of the guests.
We will try to accommodate everyone on the trip.
accompany: Please accompany your partner to the door.
An adult must accompany the child on the visit.
according: According to the map, the river flows north.
The results were listed according to age.
achieve: She worked hard to achieve her goal.
You can achieve great things with practice.
aggressive: The dog became aggressive when it felt threatened.
Aggressive behaviour is not acceptable in school.
ancient: They studied ancient buildings in history.
apparent: It was apparent that he was nervous.
Her excitement was apparent to everyone.
attached: The label was attached to the box.
Please find the document attached to the letter.
average: The average score was higher this year.
He calculated the average of the numbers.
awkward: There was an awkward silence in the room.
The box was awkward to carry.
bargain: She found a bargain in the sale.
The coat was a real bargain.
category: The book belongs in a different category.
Please choose a category from the list.
cemetery: The old cemetery was very quiet.
They visited the cemetery to pay their respects.
committee: The committee met to discuss the plans.
A small committee made the decision.
communicate: It is important to communicate clearly.
community: The whole community attended the event.
She helps support her local community.
conscience: Her conscience told her to tell the truth.
conscious: She was conscious of the noise she was making.
He remained conscious after the fall.
convenience: The shop is open late for convenience.
They chose the location for convenience.
desperate: She made a desperate attempt to win.
determined: He was determined to finish the race.
She remained determined despite the setback.
dictionary: She looked up the word in the dictionary.
disastrous: The weather had a disastrous effect on the crops.
The trip was cancelled after a disastrous mistake.
embarrass: He tried not to embarrass his friend.
Forgetting her lines did not embarrass her.
exaggerate: He tends to exaggerate the truth.
familiar: He felt familiar with the route.
foreign: They travelled to a foreign country.
government: She learned about government in school.
guarantee: The shop will guarantee a refund.
identity: She proved her identity with a card.
individual: The prize was awarded to an individual.
interrupt: Please do not interrupt the speaker.
leisure: He enjoys reading in his leisure time.
lightning: The storm included thunder and lightning.
mischievous: The mischievous puppy hid the shoe.
necessary: It is necessary to wear a helmet.
opportunity: He was given an opportunity to improve.
This is a good opportunity to learn.
parliament: The law was debated in parliament.
She learned about parliament in history.
privilege: It was a privilege to attend the event.
recognise: She did not recognise the voice.
rhythm: The song had a steady rhythm.
sacrifice: He made a sacrifice to help others.
sufficient: There was sufficient time to finish.
symbol: The dove is a symbol of peace.
twelfth: Her birthday is on the twelfth of June.
variety: There was a variety of choices.
A variety of animals live there.
yacht: The yacht was anchored in the harbour.
